## Problem

What user or reviewer problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the change you want.

## Why it matters

- [ ] evidence quality
- [ ] explainability
- [ ] self-hosted / free-path UX
- [ ] ecosystem / indexing readiness
- [ ] testing / release confidence

## Notes

Add examples, links, or related projects if helpful.
